Configuration for Git commit message linting rules, including title format and length constraints.

# Purpose
This configuration file defines rules for commit message validation. Under the `[general]` section, it specifies that contributions must include a "Signed-off-by" line and disallows cleanup commits, while not ignoring merge, fixup, amend, or squash commits. The `[title-match-regex]` section enforces a regex pattern for commit titles, requiring them to start with lowercase letters or numbers followed by a colon and a space. The `[title-max-length]` section sets the maximum length for commit titles to 100 characters.
